nodes.name: Update Business Status in Knowledge Graph

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', message: `Death Protocol complete for ${$('Parse Post-Mortem').first().json.businessName}`, businessId: $('Parse Post-Mortem').first().json.businessId, killedAt: $('Parse Post-Mortem').first().json.killedAt, postMortemFields: Object.keys($('Parse Post-Mortem').first().json.postMortem), causeOfDeath: $('Parse Post-Mortem').first().json.postMortem.cause_of_death }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'Death Protocol', message: 'KILLING BUSINESS: ' + $json.businessName + ' (ID: ' + $json.businessId + '). Reason: ' + $('Build Post-Mortem Prompt').first().json.killReason + '. Cause of death: ' + ($json.postMortem.cause_of_death || 'See post-mortem').substring(0, 300), severity: 'critical', businessId: $json.businessId, requiresResponse: false }) }}

main.node: Update Business Status in Knowledge Graph
